title: Body found at local caravan resort, no foul play suspected
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Police have said no foul...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Police have said no foul play is suspected after the body of a man was found at Point Caravan Resort on Friday night, 26 December.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Police have said no foul play is suspected after the body of a man was found at Point Caravan Resort on Friday night, 26 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Southern Cape Police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies said reports indicate that a member of the public discovered the body near the ablution facilities at about 21:50."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the man was found with a rope around his neck. He was declared dead at the scene by emergency medical services.","html":"He said the man was found with a rope around his neck. He was declared dead at the scene by emergency medical services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies said an inquest docket has been opened at the Mossel Bay Police Station and that an autopsy will be conducted during the coming week to determine the cause of death.","html":"Spies said an inquest docket has been opened at the Mossel Bay Police Station and that an autopsy will be conducted during the coming week to determine the cause of death."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you or a loved one is battling depression call the following 24-hour toll-free emergency helplines:• Suicide Crisis Helpline - 0800 567 567• Cipla Mental Health Helpline - 0800 456 789 or SMS 31393• NPOwer SA Helpline - 0800 515 515 or SMS 43010• Healthcare Workers Care Network Helpline - 0800 21 21 21 or SMS 43001","html":"If you or a loved one is battling depression call the following 24-hour toll-free emergency helplines:
• Suicide Crisis Helpline - 0800 567 567
• Cipla Mental Health Helpline - 0800 456 789 or SMS 31393
• NPOwer SA Helpline - 0800 515 515 or SMS 43010
• Healthcare Workers Care Network Helpline - 0800 21 21 21 or SMS 43001"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Body found at local caravan resort, no foul play suspected
